panels.description: Number of validators attached to each node

targets.expr: sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_validators_count{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Validators list

targets.expr: sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_latest_justified_slot{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})
sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_head_slot{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})
sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_current_slot{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

panels.description: Total number of processed slots in state transition function
panels.title: Start time

targets.expr: sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_attestation_committee_subnet{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})
sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_connected_peers{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

max by (network, job, instance) (
  (lean_node_sync_status{status="synced", network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} == 1) * 2
  or
  (lean_node_sync_status{status="syncing", network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} == 1) * 1
  or
  (lean_node_sync_status{status="idle", network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} == 1) * 0
)

panels.description: Total number of processed slots in state transition function
panels.title: Finalizations - Success

targets.expr: sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_connected_peers{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})
sum by (network, job, instance, client) (lean_connected_peers{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", client!=""})
